completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` passes with no errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran `ruff check src/ tests/` which returned 'All checks passed!' with exit code 0. Source code follows all ruff rules (E, F, W, I, N, UP) configured in pyproject.toml with line-length=100 and target-version='py310'.

Ran `mypy src/` which returned 'Success: no issues found in 4 source files'. MyPy strict mode enabled in pyproject.toml with yt_dlp.* imports ignored (no type stubs). All 4 source files (src/__init__.py, src/__main__.py, src/services/__init__.py, src/services/youtube_client.py) pass type checking.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `get_video_info` tool visible in MCP Inspector (`npx @anthropic-ai/mcp-inspector python -m src`)
completion_promises.evidence: Verified by sending MCP JSON-RPC initialize + tools/list requests to the server via stdio. The tools/list response contains exactly one tool named 'get_video_info'. The tool is registered at module level using @mcp.tool() decorator in src/__main__.py (line 38). Additionally, test_mcp_inspector_verification.py::TestMCPInspectorVisibility confirms tool is in mcp._tool_manager._tools.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] Tool shows correct parameter schema (video_url: string)
completion_promises.evidence: MCP tools/list response shows inputSchema: {"properties":{"video_url":{"title":"Video Url","type":"string"}},"required":["video_url"],"title":"get_video_infoArguments","type":"object"}. video_url is the only required parameter and is typed as string. Tests in test_mcp_inspector_verification.py::TestParameterSchema verify schema_has_video_url_property, video_url_is_string_type, video_url_is_required, and schema_has_no_extra_required_params.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] Tool docstring visible for LLM discovery
completion_promises.evidence: MCP tools/list response includes full description field with: tool purpose ('Get metadata for a YouTube video'), supported URL formats (5 formats listed), return fields (video_id, title, channel, duration_formatted, description_snippet, has_captions, has_auto_captions, available_languages). Tests in test_mcp_inspector_verification.py::TestToolDocstringDiscovery verify description is non-empty, mentions YouTube, URL formats, and metadata fields.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All existing tests still pass: `pytest tests/ -v`
completion_promises.evidence: Ran `pytest tests/ -v` which returned '96 passed, 1 warning in 0.45s'. The single warning is about an unregistered custom mark (pytest.mark.seam) which is cosmetic only. All 96 tests across 5 test files pass successfully.
